evidence_packet.technical_object: single-step voltage-domain GMM inversion from power-sample moments for probabilistic load flow
case_evidence: PV8f8 scenario with 8760 PV samples on case33bw and case141
case33 PALI K12 max mean error 1.24099%, max variance error 16.5252%, mean KS 0.19702, mean W1 0.00847423
case141 PALI K6 sparse max mean error 0.242136%, max variance error 9.78907%, mean KS 0.101975, mean W1 0.00268991
case33 identifiability condJ 1.84e3 and blkLRMaxRelVar 2.20e-6 versus freeMaxRelVar 1.10e56
case141 rank-deficient boundary condJ 3.37e4 and blkLRMaxRelVar 2.79e-8 versus freeMaxRelVar 4.80e55
Phi feasibility witness residual 1.60e-7 for realizable target and separating certificate for 4x infeasible target
evidence_packet.claim_boundary: Report GMM-PLF as the closest accuracy baseline where the evidence supports it; state the paper's positive claim as inverse voltage-domain formulation, identifiability boundary, blkLR stabilization, and SDP feasibility certification rather than as a defensive non-dominance disclaimer.

must_not_fail: presenting PV8f8 as general deployment validation

write_prompt: Use $powerlit-power-systems-paper-writing with the score-targeted gate to draft a CSEE mechanism-model-case argument from this actual evidence packet.
review_prompt: Use $powerlit-power-systems-paper-review and decision-rubric.md to score the draft; repair until the CSEE full-paper score target is 8-9 or report the blocking category.

evidence_packet.technical_object: closed-form candidate-line risk screening under typhoon-conditioned multimodal source-load tails and connected N-1 topology states
case_evidence: nine typhoon events with per-event top-risk branch, time, truncation diagnostics, retained scenario mass, and source-load/topology/mode attribution
Bebinca max violation probability 2.943e-3 at branch 202 with mean retained scenario mass 0.99145
Muifa max violation probability 9.926e-4 at branch 202 with mean retained scenario mass 0.99854
non-typhoon PCA-GMM changes top branch in 6/9 events, median top-10 overlap 0.000, median branch Spearman -0.873, median log10 risk shift 5.357
non-typhoon single Gaussian changes top branch in 6/9 events, median top-10 overlap 0.000, median branch Spearman -0.971
historical connected N-1 AC replay checks 30344 one-minute topK cases with 100% AC success over 9 replayed events
AC replay identifies outage branch 285 and monitored branch 286 as the worst connected N-1 pair in all replayed events, with maximum AC loading 149.37%
base replay has almost no overload minutes, while connected N-1 replay produces 24333 rows with an AC-confirmed over-100% branch and raises maximum loading by an average 44.20 percentage points
evidence_packet.claim_boundary: Use the evidence for two-stage screening and boundary diagnosis: RT-GMM screens typhoon source-load/topology tail candidates, while AC replay exposes structural connected N-1 weak pairs. Do not claim calibrated event-level overload prediction, direct RT-GMM-vs-replay top-branch equivalence, AC-MC equivalence, or complete N-k topology risk.

score_gate.required_repair_evidence: Independent replay evidence has been generated. The 8-9 gate is valid only if the manuscript is rewritten as a bounded two-stage screening workflow and does not claim direct top-branch equivalence between RT-GMM and AC replay.

write_prompt: Use $powerlit-power-systems-paper-writing with the score-targeted gate to draft a TPWRS formulation-evidence argument from this actual evidence packet.
review_prompt: Use $powerlit-power-systems-paper-review and decision-rubric.md to score the draft; repair screening, formulation, evidence, and claim-boundary weaknesses until the target band is 8-9 or report blockers.

evidence_packet.technical_object: edge-side Bayesian Dirichlet-NIW update for three-phase AQPPF voltage-distribution and risk updates
case_evidence: IEEE 13 small-sample posterior-only update with N_new 12, 24, 48, 96, 168
IEEE 13 Bayes mean KS 0.16226 versus small-sample PALI refit 0.1881 and static PALI 0.2154
IEEE 13 risk ranking topK overlap 0.85455 and rank correlation above 0.956 across N_new values
IEEE 123 scaling Bayes mean KS 0.13588 versus small-sample PALI refit 0.23151 and static PALI 0.14259
IEEE 123 Bayes update time mean 0.98317 s with 610.A/B/C excluded consistently by scope check
evidence_packet.claim_boundary: Do not claim global dominance over full refit; IEEE123 full-refit evidence is a boundary case showing where larger-sample refit can be strong.

score_gate.required_boundary_evidence: Separate IEEE 13 risk-ranking claims from IEEE 123 voltage-scaling and scope-check claims; do not generalize moderate IEEE123 topK-overlap evidence into a strong large-feeder risk-preservation claim.
must_not_fail: smart-grid edge claim without grid-side risk or voltage metric

write_prompt: Use $powerlit-power-systems-paper-writing with the score-targeted gate to draft an IEEE TSG edge-update argument from this actual evidence packet.
review_prompt: Use $powerlit-power-systems-paper-review and decision-rubric.md to score the draft; repair smart-grid mechanism, evidence, and boundary issues until the target band is 8-9 or report blockers.

evidence_packet.technical_object: weather-conditioned city-level TS-VARX source-load mechanism reproducer and dynamic injection-scenario generator
case_evidence: leave-one-event validation over typhoon city-event samples
train-only mechanism variants cover peak advance, correlation flip, wind rush, and wind loss checks
current claim file reports all-pass status for applicable samples: peak advance 39, correlation flip 75, wind rush 80, wind loss 14
evidence is city-level mechanism reproduction, not node-level risk propagation
evidence_packet.claim_boundary: Target AEPS only as a mechanism/scenario-generation paper. Do not claim point forecasting superiority, node-level VARX propagation, N-1 risk improvement, or probabilistic power-flow closure.

score_gate.required_boundary_evidence: Pass the 8-9 gate only under a mechanism/scenario-generation framing; block if the title, abstract, or conclusion claims node-level propagation, N-1 risk reduction, dispatch improvement, or probabilistic power-flow closure.

write_prompt: Use $powerlit-power-systems-paper-writing with the score-targeted gate to draft an AEPS operational mechanism/scenario-generation argument from this actual evidence packet.
review_prompt: Use $powerlit-power-systems-paper-review and decision-rubric.md to score the draft; if node-level risk evidence is required for the chosen framing, block instead of forcing an 8-9 full-paper claim.
